officialGuidance.principle: AI Overviews and AI Mode rely on foundational SEO: crawlable pages, internal links, page experience, textual content, matching structured data, and eligible snippets.
Automation is useful for research and structure, but scaled generated pages without added user value can violate spam policies.
Structured data should use JSON-LD, describe visible page content, and avoid misleading or irrelevant markup.
Canonical URLs should be consistent across rel=canonical and sitemap inclusion.

contentOpportunities.title: Trip organization: trip organizer app
brief: Lead with the user problem behind "trip organizer app".
Use Pack product evidence: visible workflows, screenshots, benchmark data, or public utility pages.
Include a comparison section covering when Pack differs from TripIt vs Google Travel vs Kayak Trips vs Wanderlog.
Add 3 to 5 visible question answers that can support both classic search snippets and AI answer retrieval.

outreachOpportunities.label: AI travel tools roundups
outreachOpportunities.pitch: Offer Pack as an AI-native travel assistant that combines prompts, email confirmations, calendars, and booking context.

discoveryQueries.query: "plan a trip from calendar events" "best" OR "tools"

qualificationChecklist: Article is indexed, recent, and relevant to travel planning, AI tools, airport operations, or itinerary organization.
Article mentions competing tools, roundups, missing workflow details, or outdated product lists.
Pack has a specific proof point to add rather than a generic backlink request.

generativeEngineOpportunities.title: Add direct answers for high-intent conversational questions
generativeEngineOpportunities.rationale: AI retrieval benefits from crawlable textual answers that directly address query fan-out subquestions.

targets.question: What app shares a live trip plan with family or coworkers?
What is the best AI travel planner for complex trips?
How do I track updates across a whole trip?
Which airports publish live security line data?
How do AI travel assistants compare with itinerary apps?
How do I compare travel options against my calendar?

generativeEngineOpportunities.title: Keep agent-facing resource maps complete
generativeEngineOpportunities.rationale: Pack already exposes llms.txt and capability markdown; missing or stale entries weaken retrieval routing.

generativeEngineOpportunities.title: Use consistent brand and entity language across answer surfaces
generativeEngineOpportunities.rationale: Brand aliases, founder profiles, organization schema, and sameAs links should stay aligned so retrieval systems can resolve Pack as one entity.
